title: PID Controller — Transfer Function
content: A PID controller output is u(t) = K_p·e + K_i·∫e dt + K_d·de/dt, combining proportional, integral, and derivative actions on the error signal e(t).
extended_content: K_p reduces rise time; K_i eliminates steady-state error; K_d reduces overshoot and improves stability.  In the Laplace domain: C(s) = K_p + K_i/s + K_d·s.  Tuning methods include Ziegler-Nichols, Cohen-Coon, and model-based (IMC) approaches.
